input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8665 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.activemq:artemis-commons:2.38.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The observed javac failure is caused by a 2.38.0 API change in org.apache.activemq.artemis.utils.Base64: DONT_BREAK_LINES and decodeToObject(String) are no longer present. Tests need to target the current Base64 API rather than add setup.

If generated tests exercise optional logging paths, SLF4J may use its no-provider fallback unless a binding is added, but this is not required for meaningful reachability coverage of the commons artifact.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed; artemis-commons is a self-contained utility/common module and its compile/runtime dependencies are already resolved transitively.
